claim: Claude Cowork is task delegation, not conversation: you step away and come back to completed work. It has autonomous multi-step execution with sub-agents running in parallel on your computer.
actionable: Use Cowork for bulk processing (e.g., organize 100 invoices) rather than interactive back-and-forth. Give it a folder, describe the task, approve permissions, and let it run.
source_title: Claude Cowork Full Tutorial: How to Use Claude Cowork Better Than 99% of People

claim: Persistent context MD files (about_me.md, brand_voice.md, working_preferences.md) loaded at the start of every Cowork task reduce forgetfulness and improve task quality without extra prompting.
actionable: Create 3-5 context files in your Cowork folder that Cowork reads before every task. Include your goals, writing style, work preferences, and process notes. Reference them in global instructions.
source_title: Claude Cowork Full Tutorial: How to Use Claude Cowork Better Than 99% of People

claim: Skills are reusable Cowork workflows: complete a task manually, then have Cowork turn that process into a repeatable skill (via skill creator tool) that you invoke with a /slash command.
actionable: After manually completing a recurring task in Cowork, immediately ask Cowork to create a skill from that workflow. Then use /skill_name instead of re-explaining the task every time.
source_title: Claude Cowork Full Tutorial: How to Use Claude Cowork Better Than 99% of People

claim: Scheduled tasks run skills on a cron schedule (e.g., every Monday 9am) as long as your Cowork desktop app is open and your computer is on.
actionable: Turn your most pressing recurring tasks (weekly summaries, report generation, file organization) into skills, then schedule them. This frees up hours per week.
source_title: Claude Cowork Full Tutorial: How to Use Claude Cowork Better Than 99% of People

claim: Connectors give Cowork read/write access to external apps (Gmail, Apollo, Google Drive) with fine-grained permission controls; skills then leverage connectors to automate cross-app workflows.
actionable: Connect your key business apps to Cowork via Connectors. Create skills that orchestrate those tools (e.g., find leads in Apollo, enrich them, create tasks in your CRM).
source_title: Claude Cowork Full Tutorial: How to Use Claude Cowork Better Than 99% of People

claim: Claude Cowork is for non-technical operators; Claude Code is for developers; Claude Chat is for conversation. Most business owners see more ROI from Cowork because it handles file/folder workflows without needing terminal access.
actionable: If you're a non-technical business owner, Cowork is your tool. If you're a developer, Claude Code. If you need quick Q&A, Chat. Choose based on your workflow, not your technical skill.
source_title: Claude Cowork Full Tutorial: How to Use Claude Cowork Better Than 99% of People
